events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the submittal is missing the product listing page and project note needed to determine whether the crew's proposed GFCI/AFCI shortcut is actually permitted, the correct call is `needs_more_info` (not an outright pass or fail) — proceeding on the shortcut without that documentation risks bypassing protection required by NEC 210.8/210.12, so I flagged it non-compliant pending verification and recommended standard listed test procedures in the interim.
